channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya and France Sign Multiple Agreements to Boost Cooperation Across Sectors
item.description: Kenya and France have taken their bilateral relationship a notch higher by signing 11 agreements covering transport, infrastructure, trade, energy, digital technology, health, and education. The signi...

item.title: Arctic Air to Bring Colder Temperatures and Showers Across the UK This Week
item.description: A mass of Arctic air is expected to move across the UK this week, bringing a notable cold snap that will replace the recent spring warmth. Temperatures will fall below the mid-May average, particularl...

item.title: Anambra Students Contribute ₦10.7 Million for Tinubu’s 2027 Expression of Interest Form, Credit NELFUND for Educational Support
item.description: Some student leaders for Anambra State don announce say dem don contribute about ₦10.7 million for President Bola Tinubu’s 2027 expression of interest form. Dis donation na from students wey benefit f...

item.title: Trump rejects Iran’s counterproposal amid ongoing West Asia tensions
item.description: United States President Donald Trump on Sunday firmly rejected Iran’s recent response to Washington’s peace proposal, describing it as ‘totally unacceptable’. This comes at a time when a fragile cease...

item.title: House of Representatives Set to Vote on Articles of Impeachment Against VP Sara Duterte
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – After several weeks of hearings and evidence presentation, the House of Representatives is scheduled to conduct a plenary vote on Monday afternoon regarding the four Articles of ...

item.title: Toronto Zoo Reports Healthy Progress for Pregnant Pygmy Hippo Kindia
item.description: The Toronto Zoo has confirmed that Kindia, its pregnant Pygmy hippo, is healthy and developing normally, with her expected due date in late July 2026. The zoo’s staff have been closely monitoring her ...

item.title: Pregnant paramedic attacked by patient, Ambulance Victoria urges staff safety
item.description: In a disturbing incident in Victoria, a pregnant paramedic was assaulted by a patient who punched her in the stomach. Ambulance Victoria has expressed strong support for its staff, emphasising that pe...

item.title: Bafta TV Awards 2026: 'Adolescence' dominates with record wins
item.description: At the 2026 Bafta Television Awards, Netflix drama 'Adolescence' emerged as the standout winner, securing four awards and setting a new record for the most wins in a single year. The series, which spa...

item.title: Plaid Cymru Triumphs in Welsh Election, Labour Faces Historic Loss
item.description: Wales has witnessed an unprecedented shift in its political landscape as Plaid Cymru emerges as the largest party in the Senedd for the first time in its history. Securing 43 seats, Plaid Cymru is poi...

item.title: Radioactive Waste from Nipissing First Nation Relocated to Sarnia Amid Controversy
item.description: Radioactive waste in northern Ontario, originally from Nova Beaucage mine tailings near Lake Nipissing, has sparked ongoing environmental and community concerns. Nipissing First Nation initiated a cle...

item.title: Rappler Seeks Young Filipino Leaders for One Young World Summit 2026 in Cape Town
item.description: Rappler is inviting young Filipino leaders to apply for the One Young World (OYW) Summit 2026 in Cape Town, South Africa, scheduled from November 3 to 6. For the third consecutive year, four Filipino ...

item.title: 30-Year-Old APC Aspirant Screens for Kaduna House of Representatives Seat
item.description: Mahmud Sadis Buba, a 30-year-old man from Sabon Gari, Kaduna, don cause plenty discussion online after him appear for APC screening for House of Representatives. Buba, wey people dey also call Abin Al...

item.title: Africa Forward Summit to Boost Agriculture and Value Addition Across Africa
item.description: As the Africa Forward Summit 2026 kicks off in Nairobi, the focus goes beyond heads of state and investment deals. Kenya, hosting the summit as the first Anglophone nation to do so, is using the platf...

item.title: Fertility challenges at Muhimbili: Male and female factors impact IVF success
item.description: At Muhimbili National Hospital in Dar es Salaam, the IVF programme faces major hurdles due to poor sperm quality among men and delayed childbearing among women. Doctors report that nearly two-thirds o...

item.title: Rivers State Trains 1,000 Newly Recruited Teachers to Boost Public School Standards
item.description: Rivers State Universal Basic Education Board (RSUBEB) for Port Harcourt don carry out training for 1,000 newly recruited teachers as dem wan improve standard for public primary and junior secondary sc...

item.title: National Coloured Congress Supports Leader Fadiel Adams Amid Legal Proceedings
item.description: The National Coloured Congress (NCC) has expressed strong support for its leader and Member of Parliament, Fadiel Adams, following his arrest on charges related to obstructing the investigation into t...

item.title: Sugod Bakery launches initiative to support local bakers in Quezon towns
item.description: Sugod Bakery, in partnership with URC Flour, has launched a campaign to promote and support local bakers in the towns of Sariaya and Lucban, Quezon. This initiative aims to strengthen the local baking...

item.title: Government awaits formal responses from telcos before rolling out 5G handset instalment plan
item.description: Islamabad ke mutabiq, sarkari policy jo ke 5G-enabled handsets ko aam logon ke liye sasta aur aasaan banane ka irada rakhti thi, ab kuch rukawat ka samna kar rahi hai. Yeh plan mobile phones ko instal...

item.title: Man charged with antisemitic assault in Enfield, north London
item.description: Dylan Ossei, aged 34, has been formally charged following an incident in Enfield, north London, in which three Jewish individuals were assaulted. The attacks occurred in the early hours of a Saturday ...

item.title: Robby Hoffman: The rise of a boundary-pushing comedian
item.description: Robby Hoffman, a 36-year-old New Yorker, has emerged as one of the most prominent figures in contemporary comedy. Known for her hit Netflix special 'Wake Up' and her Emmy-nominated role in the sitcom ...
